subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! The brilliant ode and luminous verse which flowed from the pen of this servant of the Abhá Beauty like water [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان قصیده غرا و خریده نوراء که از قریحه بنده جمال ابهی مانند آب
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
